problems.cause: Syntax error in AGREE annex block due to misplaced period
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the period after 'end ADIRU.impl' in the AGREE annex block

executor_steps: Identify the AGREE annex block in ADIRU.EMV2 that ends with 'end ADIRU.impl;'
Remove the period character (.) from the end of the line containing 'end ADIRU.impl;' within the AGREE annex
Ensure the AGREE annex block syntax is valid and properly closed
